name: Cognitive Alteration
descriptionTemplate: Saya gains Aliemus equal to [Arg1]% of her Base Aliemus. {Rouse}: Upon using {Crimson Furnace}, grant {Perception Warp} to Command Cards of other Awakeners in hand, Draw Pile, and Discard Pile that do not have {Destroy}. The first 3 times per turn a Command Card with {Perception Warp} is played, Saya and the Awakener who owns that card each gain [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Saya gains Aliemus equal to [Arg1]% of her Base Aliemus. {Rouse}: Upon using {Crimson Furnace}, gain [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus and 1 stack of {Gynoecium}, grant {Perception Warp} to Command Cards of other Awakeners in hand, Draw Pile, and Discard Pile that do not have {Destroy}. The first 3 times per turn a Command Card with {Perception Warp} is played, Saya and the Awakener who owns that card each gain [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.
